audit_items.proof_trace: The implementation precisely encodes the invariant: L381-382 sets the default to streams price; L385 triggers the fallback only when streams is stale (`updatedAt < minTimestamp`) AND a data feed is configured (`usdDataFeed != address(0)`); L390 then switches to the data feed price only if it is strictly more recent (`updatedAt < dataFeedUpdatedAt`), otherwise the streams price is retained. All four cases of the property assertion are covered.
